tools.name: test-check
tools.description: Fast audit — checks test contract compliance (folder structure, scripts, config) without running tests

tools.name: test-pipeline
tools.description: Universal QA pipeline — detects stack (JS/Python/other), delegates to the right agent, runs all test suites

tools.name: test-fix
tools.description: Fix failing tests — detects stack, categorizes failures, auto-repairs without weakening assertions
